MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
JAMES M. WAGSTAFFE, Esq., WAGSTAFFE, VON LOEWENFELDT, BUSCH & RADWICK LLP (415) 357-8900 wagstaffe@wvbrlaw.com Attorneys for Plaintiff FERNANDA McMANUS
JOSEPH V. DIESTEL, Esq., HINSHAW & CULBERTSON LLP 415-362-6000 jdiestel@hinshawlaw.com Attorney for Defendant Craig Checklenis (Via ZOOM)

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. Plaintiff's request for a conitnuance of this motion in open court is granted. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules and follows:

DEFENDANT CRAIG CHECKLENIS'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication is continued to July 18, 2025 per plaintiff's request in open court. Defendant does not contest plaintiff's request for continuance.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
